overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Ultra Short Bond ETF (GSST) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively-managed ETF that seeks to provide current income with preservation of capital by investing in a broad range of USD-denominated ultra-short-term bonds. GSST was launched on Apr 15, 2019 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
